prompt: Generate a wildlife distribution map of a forest region. Use Image 1–3 to place animals in their respective habitats on the map.
prompt_refined: Generate a clear, infographic-style wildlife distribution map of a forest region, featuring distinct habitat zones like dense woodlands, open clearings, and a river system. Integrate the animals from the reference images into their appropriate habitats: Position the brown bear (Image 1) in a dense forest area, possibly near a mountain range, in the upper-left quadrant. Place the deer (Image 2) within an open meadow or clearing, adjacent to the depicted river, in the central-right area. Include the small blue bird (Image 3) perched within the canopy of trees in a rich woodland section, towards the lower-left side of the map.
objects: Infographic-style map of a forest region
Deer in central-right area near river
Small blue bird in lower-left side within canopy of trees
